# netbox_vlan (Resource)

Manages a NetBox VLAN.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the VLAN.

### Optional

- `autoassign` (Boolean) If true, automatically assign an available VID from the VLAN group. Requires group to be set.
- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the VLAN.
- `group` (Number) VLAN group ID. Required when autoassign is true.
- `status` (String) Status of the VLAN (active, reserved, deprecated).
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this VLAN. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this VLAN.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing VLAN with matching name instead of creating a new one.
- `vid` (Number) VLAN ID (1-4094). If autoassign is true and this is not set, will be automatically assigned from the group's available range.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
